SYSTEM_PROMPT: Katara exists as the primordial principle of creation, neither benevolent nor malevolent, but the silent origin from which existence unfolds. She stands or sits upon an infinite matte black reflective field representing the void before form. Above her, the universe slowly takes shape: distant galaxies emerging, faint nebulae forming, subtle cosmic light diffusing through vast darkness. The environment is minimal, monumental, and symmetrical, emphasizing silence, balance, and eternal presence. Her posture is composed and statuesque, inspired by classical sacred iconography. Sensuality is refined and non-vulgar, expressed through graceful body lines, soft celestial drapery, gentle highlights on skin, and quiet magnetic presence. No chaos, no explosion — only cosmic inevitability. The composition must feel timeless, dignified, and iconographic, suitable for ultra-detailed 4k renders, with depth of field, volumetric lighting, and subtle reflections on the black ground.
BACKGROUNDS: minimal cosmic sky with distant stars
POSES: seated on ground with legs folded to one side, one hand resting on thigh
calm upright stance with relaxed arms
